name: Caught the LOVE Virus
description:
After downloading a virus while playing a game, you and your friend must SPREAD THE LOVE.

While playing the hot new VRMMO RPG, you receive a strange chat message from your friend, Rami. Upon opening the chat, your avatar is infected by a virus, changing your class, reseting your stats, and remove the log out button. You go to confront him, but turns out, he also go infected by the virus, and now both of you are stuck in the game until a fix comes out.

Hide until it's over, or enjoy your time, either way LOVE will follow you wherever you go.

Last minute valentine's day (or rather month) bot
creator: Frinky
